summary: package eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.supervision; import eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.orchestration.selfdev.BranchVariant; public class CriticalFailurePolicy implements ResolverPolicy { @Override public PolicyResult evaluate(BranchVariant variant) { if (!variant.isSuccess() || (variant.getErrorMessage() != null && !variant.getErrorMessage().isEmpty())) { return new PolicyResult(0.0, 1.0, "Critical failure or error message detected: " + variant.getErrorMessage()); } return new PolicyResult(1.0, 1.0, "No critical failures detected."); } @Override public String getName() { return "CriticalFailurePolicy"; } }
evolutionaryNotes: Suggestion: Add @EvolutionComponent annotation to this high-importance class.
